title: coronilla varia var. pyrenaica
intro: Coronilla varia var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean crown vetch or French clover, is a flowering plant species within the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Coronilla varia var. pyrenaica is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
